daily.today_energy: Your emotional radar is finely tuned right now. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your intuition's way of texting you important updates. The vibes are asking you to slow down and actually feel your feelings instead of rushing through them.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's romantic or platonic, the universe is hinting at deeper connections forming. If you're single, your energy is magnetic today—just be authentically you and watch what happens.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving skills are activated. This is a solid day to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or tackle a project from a fresh angle. Your colleagues are picking up on your focused energy, and it's honestly inspiring.
daily.health: Your body's asking for some gentle, intentional movement today—maybe something that feels more like meditation than exercise. Hydrate extra and give yourself permission to rest without guilt. Your nervous system will thank you.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to lean into your natural intuition, Cancer. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to trust yourself more and seek external validation less. Something's shifting in your favor—stay open to unexpected moments of clarity.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a gentle pull toward authenticity in your connections. Stop overthinking what they might think and show up as your real self. The right people will vibe with your energy when you're genuinely present.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are firing on all cylinders right now. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or approach a project from a totally fresh angle. Trust that unconventional thinking will get you noticed.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually listen to what it needs. Whether that's more sleep, moving differently, or just being gentler with yourself—honor those signals. Rest isn't lazy; it's strategic.
